head.hi: Mr. Thomas B. McCabe to Brigadier General Bernhard A. Johnson, at Shanghai

div.p: 81917. From Bell. Mar deal approved yesterday in conference of FLC officials here and Vice Admiral W. S. Farber, Deputy Chief of Naval Operations, subject to the following changes.
[Here follow suggested changes in the draft contract.]

You are clear to proceed on this deal and sign contract as indicated above. Suggest you cable me at once whether or not this is entirely satisfactory so I may iron out any difficulties here on the spot.
Admiral Farber will issue instructions to have the material declared surplus without delay. [Bell.]
